primary_code_to_label.01.04: General ASD Methods without Concrete Object Experiments
primary_code_to_label.08: Agricultural, Food, Forestry, Animal and Fishery Sciences
primary_code_to_label.11: Social, Behavioral, Economic and Knowledge System Sciences

primary_terms.label: Formal, Information and Computational Sciences
primary_terms.definition: Formal, information, computational, mathematical, and systems-science research objects, excluding general ASD method-only records that belong in the separate 01.04 bucket.
include: general systems or complexity science with a concrete formal-science object
exclude: general ASD method papers without concrete scientific-object experiments
science-system or knowledge-production studies that belong in 11

primary_terms.label: General ASD Methods without Concrete Object Experiments
primary_terms.definition: Separate general-method bucket for ASD / research-agent method papers without concrete scientific-object experiments, validations, benchmark tasks, case studies, or reported results.
include: general research-agent framework papers without concrete scientific-object validation
general ASD methodology without object-level experiments
exclude: any paper with concrete object-level experiments in formal 01-11 modules
formal 01 computational-science research objects

primary_terms.label: Physics, Astronomy and Cosmic Sciences
primary_terms.definition: Physics, astronomy, astrophysics, cosmology, and cosmic-science research objects.
exclude: materials-science experiments classified under 04
engineering applications classified under 09 or 10

primary_terms.label: Chemical Sciences
exclude: materials systems whose primary object is material structure or property
biological assays whose primary object is life science

primary_terms.label: Materials Science
primary_terms.definition: Materials-science research objects, including material discovery, synthesis, characterization, and properties.
exclude: pure chemistry records whose primary object is chemical reaction or molecule
engineering manufacturing systems without materials-science object focus

primary_terms.label: Earth and Environmental Sciences
primary_terms.definition: Earth, climate, geoscience, ecology, and environmental-science research objects.
exclude: agricultural systems classified under 08
social-policy studies classified under 11

primary_terms.label: Life Sciences
primary_terms.definition: Biological and life-science research objects outside direct clinical medicine.
exclude: clinical diagnosis or treatment classified under 07
agricultural biology classified under 08 when the primary object is agricultural production

primary_terms.label: Medical and Health Sciences
primary_terms.definition: Medicine, clinical health, diagnostics, therapeutics, translational health, and biomedical-care research objects.
exclude: basic life-science mechanism studies without clinical or health target
agricultural or veterinary production systems classified under 08

primary_terms.label: Agricultural, Food, Forestry, Animal and Fishery Sciences
primary_terms.definition: Agricultural, food, forestry, animal, fishery, and production-oriented biological research objects.
exclude: basic life science without production-oriented agricultural object
human clinical health classified under 07

primary_terms.label: Engineering and Industrial Technology Sciences
primary_terms.definition: Engineering, industrial technology, manufacturing, robotics, and applied technical-system research objects.
exclude: materials-science object studies classified under 04
transportation, marine, aerospace, and related systems classified under 10

primary_terms.label: Aerospace, Marine and Transportation Sciences
primary_terms.definition: Aerospace, marine, ocean engineering, transportation, and mobility-system research objects.
exclude: general engineering systems classified under 09 when not aerospace, marine, or transportation focused

primary_terms.label: Social, Behavioral, Economic and Knowledge System Sciences
primary_terms.definition: Social, behavioral, economic, science-system, knowledge-production, policy, and human-system research objects.
exclude: technical system papers without social, behavioral, economic, or knowledge-system object
